# 🧠 Model Weights (54)

Pretrained brains you can download, run locally, and fine-tune on your own terms. Skip the GPU bill and start from state of the art.

- [deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3) — ⭐ 103,692 · `Python` · Models — This repository contains the official release of DeepSeek-V3, a large-scale multimodal artificial intelligence model from DeepSeek AI, including its weights and associated inference code. It is designed for various AI applications requiring advanced language and vision understanding.
- [openai/CLIP](https://github.com/openai/CLIP) — ⭐ 33,562 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Multimodal — This repository contains CLIP, a foundational vision model that learns visual concepts from natural language supervision.
